source_limitations: All 45 legacy items remain unsupported by an exact generic ECG-review section.
Condition-specific ECG guidance does not validate a generic interpretation, investigation, referral, or follow-up template.
This workflow remains a clinical blocker pending qualified clinician review and an exact authoritative source.
No authoritative source record is committed for this workflow; all legacy clinical content was removed.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
